summary.key_theme: nLight 成功轉型國防雷射領域，獲得分析師看好與地緣政治緊張帶來的需求支撐，儘管股價短期波動劇烈。

bullish.title: Baird Initiates Coverage On nLight with Outperform Rating, Announces Price Target of $95
bullish.reason: Baird 分析師 Peter Arment 給予 Outperform 評級並設定 95 美元目標價，顯示華爾街對其國防業務轉型的認可，選此篇作為代表是因為其包含完整評級細節。

bullish.title: NLight (LASR) Stock Hits New Highs: What's Going On?
bullish.reason: 中東地區地緣政治緊張局勢升級，市場預期國防雷射需求增加，直接推動股價創下新高。

bullish.title: nLIGHT: The Defense Pivot Worked, And The Stock Is Already Running Hot
bullish.reason: 深度分析指出公司成功轉型國防產業，雖然股價已處於高位，但基本面改善提供了長期支撐。

bullish.title: Assessing nLIGHT (LASR) Valuation After Defense Laser Showcase Spurs Fresh Investor Interest
bullish.reason: 國防雷射展示活動成功吸引投資人目光，市場重新評估其估值模型。

bullish.title: Did Revenue Growth and Defense Wins Just Shift nLIGHT's (LASR) Investment Narrative?
bullish.reason: 營收成長與國防訂單的斬獲，正實質改變市場對該公司的投資敘事與成長預期。

bullish.title: Why Is nLIGHT (LASR) Stock Soaring Today
bullish.reason: 針對股價飆升的即時市場解讀，確認了地緣政治因素對股價的短期推升作用。

bearish.title: Moog, Comfort Systems, Viavi Solutions, nLIGHT, and Sterling Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 股價在經歷快速上漲後出現獲利了結賣壓，反映市場對短期過熱的修正。

bearish.title: nLIGHT, Tutor Perini, Vertiv, Hubbell, and Vicor Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 股價出現劇烈回調，顯示在波動性高的環境下，投資人對高估值個股的風險敏感度增加。

bearish.title: Ondas, AeroVironment, and nLIGHT See Major Stock Moves After Iran Strikes
bearish.reason: 雖然標題提及重大波動，但主要歸因於地緣政治事件，市場對此類消息的反應通常伴隨高波動與不確定性。

neutral.title: This SPX Technologies Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Wednesday
neutral.reason: 此篇為綜合性新聞，僅提及 LASR 為其中之一，資訊量較分散，故歸類為中性。

neutral.title: NLight Stock Surges After Baird's $95 Price Target
neutral.reason: 此篇與 rank 1 的 Baird 評級新聞內容重複，僅作為市場反應的補充說明。

neutral.title: nLight shares are trading higher after Baird initiated coverage on the stock with an Outperform rating and announced a Price Target of $95.
neutral.reason: 此篇與 rank 1 的 Baird 評級新聞內容重複，僅作為股價變動的即時更新。
